entries.claim: Five exact ordered-header variants were verified across 148 locally retained files covering 2022 through May 2026.
A partial-date source-object boundary motivated an ownership-boundary scenario.
All published benchmark rows and duplicate, correction, incompatible-replacement, malformed, and recovery cases are constructed.
DuckDB and pinned Spark produce the same reviewed semantic outputs and terminal state hashes for the portable suite.
A bounded serverless Delta execution matches the portable oracle and preserves pointer invariants.
The suite proves real TfL correction incidents, complete archive coverage, production Databricks reliability, performance superiority, SLA behaviour, or novelty.
